name: Chiles Rellenos Tofu Casserole Lowfat
recipeIngredient: 7 ounces whole green chile peppers, canned
1 package Tofu Mori-nu lite firm, drained
3/4 pound low fat cheddar cheese, shredded
3/4 pound low fat monterey jack cheese, shredded
7 ounces diced green chile peppers, canned
recipeInstructions:
1. Split the whole chilies lengthwise and remove seeds.
2. Lay the chilies flat in a 13-by-9-inch baking pan.
3. Place tofu on paper towels and gently press to remove excess moisture.
4. Crumble the tofu and blend half of it with the cheddar cheese.
5. Blend the other half of the tofu with the jack cheese.
6. Top the chilies with half of the cheddar cheese mixture and half of the jack cheese mixture.
7. Add a layer of diced chilies on top.
8. Repeat layers of cheeses and chilies.
9. Beat eggs with milk and pour over all the layers.
10. Spread salsa evenly over the casserole.
11. Bake in a 350-degree oven for 45 minutes.
